inputs.label: standard
inputs.title: How to Conduct an Interview for Documentary Film
inputs.summary: A YouTube tutorial covering preparation, question design, technical setup, and how to create a safe space for subjects to open up. Aimed at first-time documentary filmmakers.

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.title: Freelance Journalism Invoice Template
inputs.summary: A blog post providing a free downloadable invoice template for freelance journalists.

inputs.label: european
inputs.title: Understanding EU Media Regulation: A Guide for Journalists
inputs.summary: A podcast episode explaining the European Media Freedom Act, the Digital Services Act, and GDPR as they affect working journalists. Covers practical implications for newsrooms in EU member states. Features interviews with media lawyers in Berlin and Brussels.
